title: Trade-in Launch Phase Presentation
bodyHtml:
Welcome to the Trade-in Launch Phase

Congrats, your Trade-in service is now activated! You’re all set to purchase devices with Back Market Trade-in. In this article, we’ll fill you in on everything you need to know for your Trade-in Launch Phase.
 

What’s the Trade-in Launch Phase?

The Trade-in Launch Phase follows the same concept as the Launch Phase you already went through to sell on Back Market.

This period is meant to provide you with all the knowledge you need to get off to a good start with our Trade-in service. We want to set you up for success with all the rules and tools you’ll need to achieve your goals while also providing high quality service to customers at the same time.

Your Trade-in Launch Phase consists of three trainings you’ll need to complete within a maximum of two months.

Each training completion will increase your daily limit by five.
And, if you’re based in France, Spain, or Germany, the completion of all 3 training segments will give you access to our entire EU market!
 

What does the training consist of?

Each training segment includes:

  • Reading some articles in the Seller Support Center (SSC)
  • Completing a few simple tasks to validate the training

 

Training segment 1: Generating 15 Trade-in orders

Objective: You’ll learn how to add your desired listings to your Back Office, how to keep your offers competitive over time, and how to get devices from customers.

Check out these articles in the SSC:

  • Getting started with your Back Office
  • Getting started with your listings


Training segment 2: Processing your first Trade-in orders

Pre-requisite: You’ll need to have completed the first training segment before starting this one. You’ll have 14 days to complete training segment 2 before we check.

Objective: You’ll learn how to use your Back Office to process your Trade-in orders on time, you’ll become familiar with our quality rules and have adjusted your processes to comply with them, and you’ll be in good financial shape to pay for your orders.

Tasks to validate training: 

  • Successfully process payment for five Trade-in orders
  • Have your quality of service compliant with these quality thresholds
    • Counteroffer Rate < 33%
    • Late Processing Rate < 15%
    • Late Response Rate < 15%

Check out these articles in the SSC:

  • Getting started with first-class quality
  • Getting started with your payments & invoices


Training segment 3: Being well informed and asking for help

Objective: You’ll learn how to receive communications from Back Market Trade-in, where to look for additional information when you need it, and how to ask the SSC for help.

Check out these articles in the SSC:

  • Getting started with seamless communication

Tasks to validate training: 

  • Submit a request to the SSC here to ask for advice on Trade-in. 
  • See the image below and fill in the areas highlighted in yellow.

 

 

How do I validate my Trade-in Launch Phase?

You have 2 months to complete these three training segments and the tasks they include.

If you haven’t finished in this time, you’ll still be able to use Trade-in, but your daily limit will remain capped. We highly recommend completing the trainings in this time so you understand all the rules and processes. This will set up you up for maximum success!
